allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''Astro:'', pkg.dependencies?.astro || pkg.devDependencies?.astro\);")

Bash(node -e "const crypto = require\(''crypto''\); console.log\(''APP_KEYS='' + [1,2,3,4].map\(\(\)=>crypto.randomBytes\(16\).toString\(''base64''\)\).join\('',''\)\); console.log\(''API_TOKEN_SALT='' + crypto.randomBytes\(32\).toString\(''base64''\)\); console.log\(''ADMIN_JWT_SECRET='' + crypto.randomBytes\(32\).toString\(''base64''\)\); console.log\(''JWT_SECRET='' + crypto.randomBytes\(32\).toString\(''base64''\)\); console.log\(''TRANSFER_TOKEN_SALT='' + crypto.randomBytes\(32\).toString\(''base64''\)\);")
